I want to buy toll free

**This is how to Buy a Toll-Free Number in CINNOX:**

To purchase a toll-free number, follow these steps:

1. **Visit the Buy a Virtual Number Page:**
   - Go to our [Buy a Virtual Number](https://servicehub.cinnox.com/buy-virtual-number) page.

2. **Choose Your Country and Number Type:**
   - Select Denmark from the list of countries.
   - Choose the toll-free number option.

3. **Set Your Call Forwarding Preference:**
   - Decide how you want incoming calls to be forwarded (e.g., to a mobile or landline).

4. **Fill Out the Form:**
   - Provide your business information for verification.

5. **Activate Your Account:**
   - Follow the instructions to activate your account.

6. **Make Payment:**
   - Pay online using a credit card.

For more details, you can watch the [Buy a Number YouTube video](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=joObIo8FfQY).

If you need further assistance, I can connect you with our sales team. Just let me know!
